mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.recommendations_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, user_id, product_id, product_name, recommendation_type, score, reason, created_time ) SELECT pr.id, pr.tenant, NOW(), pr.user_id, pr.product_id, COALESCE(p.name, ''), pr.recommendation_type, pr.score, pr.reason, pr.created_time FROM hm_recommendation.product_recommendations pr LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON pr.product_id = p.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.trending_products_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_id, product_name, category, trending_score, time_window, view_count, order_count, created_time ) SELECT tp.id, tp.tenant, NOW(), tp.product_id, COALESCE(p.name, ''), tp.category, tp.trending_score, tp.time_window, COALESCE(tp.view_count, 0), COALESCE(tp.order_count, 0), tp.created_time FROM hm_recommendation.trending_products tp LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON tp.product_id = p.id
